Fixed: TrackerTimeoutError + WARNING log for transient bd timeouts. error_watcher will no longer auto-file duplicate bug beads for hiccups.
Root cause: Dolt server accumulated state from heavy agent traffic, queries slowed past the 5s bd timeout. Resolved by restarting bd-dolt-sql-server. Followup tracked separately for auto-recovery.

human-only: requires human GitHub repo transfer + org choice; tagged human-only so orchestrator skips. See completion comment for what an agent can do once a human decides on newowner.

Human-only validation task — in-process tests pass; live e2e checklist documented in comments for the operator. Cannot be completed by an autonomous agent (requires push access to NVIDIA-Omniverse/trickle, 60+min CI cycles per PR, and real-time observation of GitHub merge queue state).

Flipped Project.merge_queue_enabled=True for trickle via PATCH /api/v1/projects/proj-3e4e9214; verified runtime behavior change in oompah.log (YOLO now uses POST /auto-merge instead of PUT /merge). oompah project correctly left at merge_queue_enabled=False per issue requirement.

Raised Project.max_in_flight_prs on trickle (proj-3e4e9214) from 1 to 3 via PATCH /api/v1/projects/proj-3e4e9214. Verified via API GET response and projects.json on disk. Both prerequisite issues (oompah-zlz_2-041 merge_queue_enabled=True, oompah-zlz_2-beq test PR validation) were closed. Trickle now supports ≥3 PRs/hour parallel CI throughput per §6 Success Criteria of docs/submit-queue.md.

Fixed: enable_auto_merge now uses GraphQL enablePullRequestAutoMerge mutation (no REST endpoint exists). Distinct error message for allow_auto_merge=false repos. Tests + regression coverage added. Operator must still flip allow_auto_merge=true on target repo.
Implemented auto_merge_enabled+mergeable_state on ReviewRequest, YOLO idempotency guard, and queued count on dashboard reviews_summary. 270 related tests pass.

Implemented YOLO merge-failure classifier (config/conflict/transient). Config errors no longer dispatch doomed agents; instead they log a deduplicated ERROR and surface as needs_repo_config in the dashboard. 23 new tests; full pre-existing test suite still passes.

Fixed: list_open_reviews / get_review now query GitHub merge queue state via GraphQL and mark queued PRs as auto_merge_enabled=True, so YOLO's btf.1 idempotency guard skips them on subsequent ticks. The hypothesis in the issue (parser dropping the field) was wrong — GitHub itself clears auto_merge=null when the merge queue takes over.
Watchdog offloaded to tick thread pool via run_in_executor; _reset_orphaned_in_progress was already offloaded in oompah-zlz_2-nvr.

Fixed: _fetch_ci_status no longer short-circuits to 'failed' on legacy combined-status failure when modern check-runs are clean. 9 unit tests pass (5 original + 4 new). Pushed to origin in commit e653791.
Implementation merged in PR #87 (commit 0ad8400). All CI checks passed. Acceptance criteria met per prior agent verification + Shawn's confirmation.
Replaced break with continue on YOLO ci-failed branch in _yolo_review_actions_sync. Conflict-path and ci-failed dispatches no longer serialize across PRs. Tests added. Branch pushed.
CI fixed: test_epic_strategy default-value assertions updated to match main's new 'stacked' default. All 3 Python matrix builds (3.11/3.12/3.13) now pass on PR #90.
Watchdog v1 delivered with D1-D4 detectors, action history recording, D4 direct-merge strategy switch, idempotency via pattern_key cache, state pruning when PRs leave cache, and 40 new tests.

Duplicate of oompah-zlz_2-ovt; fix already merged to main (commit 13ad6c2). The running orchestrator had not yet restarted to pick up the fix when error_watcher detected log recurrences and filed this bead.

Implemented error_watcher auto-close on retry success. Branch oompah-zlz_2-0nc pushed; orchestrator wires ErrorWatcher.auto_close_for_issue from _on_worker_exit when reason='normal' AND retry_attempt>0. 16 new tests added; 403 pre-existing tests pass.
duplicate of already-shipped fix (commits ovt/bpa/amx/hp2/0nc); running orchestrator on stale pre-fix code, will resolve on operator 'make restart'

WORKFLOW.md → .oompah/agent_profiles.json one-shot migration shipped. AgentProfileStore + resolve_agent_profiles() implement source-precedence (JSON wins by default; OOMPAH_AGENT_PROFILES_SOURCE=workflow opts out). Migration logs INFO once, drift logs WARN once per process. Wired into ServiceConfig.from_workflow + /api/v1/budget snapshot for the dashboard. Documented in docs/agent-profiles.md.
Fixed inline as part of oompah-zlz_2-rls — tests/test_config.py::test_from_workflow_custom now monkeypatches OOMPAH_AGENT_PROFILES_PATH to a tmp_path.

Delivered ACP-mode affordances in profile dialog: dimmed provider dropdown for acp mode, hidden command field, claude-model placeholder, budget-bypass warning in dialog and on cards. Backend validation hook enforces provider existence for api mode, warns for acp mode, validates model_role against provider.model_roles. 154 profile-related tests passing; full suite 2186/2186.
Implemented: AgentProfileStore is now the source of truth; WORKFLOW.md agent.profiles block retired with drift warning + strict-mode failure path. 14 new tests in tests/test_workflow_loading.py.

Duplicate of already-fixed transport_error class. Fixes ovt/bpa/amx/hp2 (commits 13ad6c2, 4951658, bdf6702, 4992235) landed 2026-05-08/09 in oompah/api_agent.py. Bead was filed by previous orchestrator process running stale code; current orchestrator (PID 85614, started 2026-05-10 19:10) has all four fixes. Errno 57 ENOTCONN is now wrapped as TransientServerError in _http_post with 5-retry recovery.

Duplicate of already-fixed bug. Root cause was fixed by ovt/bpa/amx/hp2 (2026-05-09). Bead was filed by stale orchestrator pre-restart; current orchestrator (post 2026-05-10T19:11:09) has the fix and produces no Errno 57 errors. See comments for full investigation.

Duplicate-of-fixed: the 'ApiAgentSession.run_task failed: [Errno 57] Socket is not connected' log signature was eliminated by commits ovt/bpa/amx/hp2 (merged 2026-05-09). The current api_agent.py OSError handler emits 'transport_error: [Errno N] ...' (a distinct fingerprint), guarded by 3 regression tests in tests/test_api_agent_budget.py (all passing on this branch). Future Errno 57 events from raw OSErrors that leak past _http_post's retry wrap will fingerprint into a NEW 'transport_error' bead category instead of this title. No code change required — closing per the 'stale-orchestrator-error-beads' project memory.

Implemented ACP backend abstraction + registry (Child A of multi-backend ACP epic). Existing acp_agent test suite passes unchanged; 40 new tests for registry/ABC/ModelProvider.backend/UI. Branch oompah-zlz_2-0hzh pushed to origin.

Completed: Added Billing column to /providers role-assignment matrix. Cell shows backend + billing_model per role; per_token providers display the model_costs rate or 'rates not set' warning. 19 new tests + existing suite green. Stacked on origin/oompah-zlz_2-6xc + origin/oompah-zlz_2-ag7h.
Re-landed via PR #109 — work originally pushed on 2026-05-10 was never opened as a PR; rebased on current main, all tests pass, and PR is open for orchestrator to merge.

Fixed by allowing provider.default_model to bypass the provider.models validation. When default_model is set but not in the models whitelist, the code now logs a warning and proceeds with dispatch instead of raising ValueError. This allows models like nvidia/MiniMax-M2.7-NVFP4 to work on providers like Godspeed even when not explicitly listed in provider.models.

ACP backend abstraction completed: AcpBackend ABC + registry, ClaudeAcpBackend as first backend, ModelProvider.backend field, AcpAgentSession facade, /api/v1/acp-backends endpoint, Backend dropdown in providers UI. Rebased onto current main, force-pushed as acd01f5. 2438 tests pass.

CodexAcpBackend delivered (child B of multi-backend ACP epic). Registers as 'codex' at import time, validates per-token/subscription billing models, bridges oompah tools via openai-agents SDK @function_tool, normalizes cost reporting. All 178 ACP tests pass including codex backend tests. Branch rebased onto main and pushed.
Per-token ACP billing rebased onto current main and PR #115 opened (stacked on #114 for Child A). 45 new tests pass (34 billing + 11 UI), full suite 2483 passing.

All acceptance criteria implemented, tested (158 + 2497-wide suite pass), committed as 35633e4 and pushed to origin/oompah-zlz_2-zvm0. Note: agent lacks collaborator permission to create PR — branch is on origin for maintainer to open a PR from.

Implemented ModelProvider._reconcile_model_roles() and wired it into all models-mutation call sites. When a provider's models[] changes (via UI edit, Fetch Models, or auto-populate), orphaned model_roles entries pointing at missing models are repointed to default_model (or first available model). Empty models[] is preserved as-is with a WARNING (ACP scenario). Startup self-healing via ProviderStore._load() ~> _reconcile_all() covers hand-edited providers.json drift. All 2471 tests pass.
PR #118 merged to main as ff30581. No merge conflict — earlier YOLO alert was stale. CI green (3.11/3.12/3.13).

Implemented: Added _describe_rate_limit_context helper that enriches rate-limit alert/comment/log messages with provider+model (e.g., InferenceAPI (claude-sonnet-4-6) — Reason: tokens). ACP mode shows 'Claude SDK' without a model. Fallback to 'an upstream API' when resolution fails but still appends the parsed reason.
Rebased onto main; merge conflicts in reviews.html resolved (preserves both sort-bar from main and spinner from branch). All tests pass. Force-pushed to origin.
Duplicate of oompah-zlz_2-lnbi (both filed by branch-cleanup; keep lnbi)
Duplicate of oompah-zlz_2-my8u (both filed by branch-cleanup; keep my8u)
Rebased onto main, conflicts resolved, all relevant tests pass.

Branch cleanup complete. Phase 1: ~189 no-op branches deleted across oompah (154→22) and trickle (143→86). Phase 2: 18 oompah stranded beads reopened P1/bug+gz8w dep+diagnostic comment; 60 trickle beads already open/P1. 2 orphan beads filed. Script committed to scripts/branch-cleanup.sh (idempotent, dry-run default, whitelist documented).

Fix committed in a5b065a: added TrackerTimeoutError subclass, configurable timeout via OOMPAH_BD_TIMEOUT_SECONDS (default 60s), removed slow fallback on timeout, logs timeout at WARNING instead of ERROR to prevent error_watcher auto-filing duplicate beads. Orchestrator catches TrackerTimeoutError separately and returns [] for the tick. 13 new tests added.

Delivered ErrorWatcher fingerprint hardening per spec. Branch oompah-zlz_2-ag7 pushed (commit 2d13eeb). 76 tests pass in test_error_watcher.py, 125 in test_orchestrator_handlers.py + test_tracker.py. Net effect: 3-bean Dolt slowdown scenario now produces 1 bead via explicit error_class collapsing + tighter free-form normalization.

Live agent profile reload on store write - all requirements implemented and verified with 55 feature tests plus full test suite (2242 tests). Implemented: AgentProfileStore with ReloadCallback hook, Orchestrator.replace_agent_profiles + _apply_pending_agent_profiles (quiescent swap at _tick step 0), /api/v1/agent-profiles CRUD endpoints, config.py s
Production fix (OSError handler in api_agent.py:_http_post) landed in PR #99 on main. Regression tests committed to oompah-zlz_2-bsg battle-card oompah-zlz_2-bsg for future coverage hardening.

Implementation complete: agent_profile_store.py with one-shot WORKFLOW.md→JSON migration, OOMPAH_AGENT_PROFILES_SOURCE env var for opt-out, agent_profiles_source surfaced in /api/v1/budget for UI control state, docs/agent-profiles.md with precedence flowchart. All 30 tests pass. Branch ff6472e pushed.

Fix is committed at de58103. _yolo_review_actions_sync no longer breaks on failed enqueue/merge (oo pah-zlz_2-grw fix A); merge-queue successful enqueues continue iteration (fix B); direct-merge successful merges still break (genuine race protection preserved). All 17 TestYoloEnqueueMode tests pass. Pre-existing test failures in test_webhooks.py (missing pytest-asyncio) and test_dashboard_hide_merged.py are unrelated to this fix.

Step 5 cutover landed. trickle has merge queue via ruleset id=15997351 (active); oompah has legacy branch protection (user-owned constraint). 20 cutover script tests pass; 50 merge queue tests pass. Operator follow-up: flip Project.merge_queue_enabled=True for trickle in UI.
Merge conflicts resolved; rebased onto main; force-pushed 51b860b.

Deleted orphan branch 'udpah-b6d'. The branch was a typo of 'umpah-b6d' and contained no actual code changes (only an agent's placeholder comment file). The swimlane alignment work this branch was named after was already completed and merged via PR #9 on the correctly-named 'umpah-b6d' branch.

Role-assignment matrix implemented and tested: 4-row UI table with provider/model dropdowns, read-only mode column, status indicators; GET+PUT /api/v1/agent-profiles/role-matrix endpoints with atomicity; 30 passing tests. Live verification is a post-merge operator step.
Implementation complete. Billing column added to role-assignment matrix showing backend + billing_model per role, with per-token rate display from model_costs.

Focus override feature complete: POST /api/v1/agents/{id}/override-focus endpoint (404/400/202 contracts), override_focus param threaded through all 4 worker paths in orchestrator.py, bd remember persistence for override events, GET /api/v1/foci/override-history endpoint, agent-log popup UI with Focus row + Override dropdown + confirmation prompt, 35 tests in tests/test_focus_override.py all passing.
Orphan branch umpah-bz4 deleted — its fix for project_id propagation was already in main via oompah-0gd commits (fa3b9bf, dce6fab).

Fix delivered: _yolo_retry_ci now files a sibling ci-fix task bead under epic-with-children PRs instead of relabeling the epic (which the dispatcher silently skips). BeadsTracker.create_issue extended with labels= and parent= kwargs. 4 new orchestrator tests + 3 new tracker tests, all passing.

Fixed: HTTP 401 (authentication error) now raises TransientServerError(status_code=401) — the existing 5-retry loop in _call_api activates for 401 responses. run_task logs 401 at WARNING level with 'auth_error' tag (not ERROR), preventing error_watcher from auto-filing duplicate bug beads every poll tick. The full error body from the server is preserved in result.error for diagnostics.

Fix delivered: _yolo_retry_ci now files a sibling ci-fix task bead under epics-with-children instead of relabeling the epic (which the dispatcher silently skips). BeadsTracker.create_issue extended with labels= and parent= kwargs. All tests pass (153/153 on test_orchestrator_merged.py + test_tracker.py).

Billing column delivered. Merge conflict resolved — the branch cleanly rebased onto origin/main. Implementation: computeRoleMatrixBilling() and lookupModelRate() wired into renderRoleMatrix(), 6-column matrix (Role/Provider/Model/Mode/Billing/Status). ACP subscription: green tag; ACP per-token: yellow tag + rate/warning; API: blue tag + rate/warning. 19 new test cases in TestBillingColumn + TestComputeBilling. All 194 targeted tests pass.

Billing column added to /providers role-assignment matrix. Matrix now has 6 columns: Role, Provider, Model, Mode, Billing, Status. Billing cell shows backend + billing_model tag + rate for per_token providers (or warning). All 2808 tests pass.

Implementation complete. All 1984 tests pass (excluding pre-existing webhook failures). The 'Operator corrections' few-shot section is properly emitted in the LLM triage prompt when override history exists, with correct ordering, truncation, and project filtering. No CI failures to fix.
All acceptance criteria verified. Tests pass. Implementation complete.
All acceptance criteria met. PR #132 created.
Merge conflict resolved. Branch rebased onto origin/main (33960c0). All 2255 non-webhook tests pass. No code changes needed — the existing commit a7fbc8c is clean on top of main.

Completed: Added sticky activity summary header with live counters (Turn, Tools, Tokens, Cost, Elapsed) to the agent-log popup. Header is visible in both Verbose:ON and Verbose:OFF modes, updates on every handleActivityPush callback, and shows 'Waiting for first event...' when empty. 29 new tests pass.
Merge conflict resolved: rebased onto origin/main (b17917a). Resolved conflicts in .env.example, WORKFLOW.md, oompah/config.py, oompah/orchestrator.py. All 2839 tests pass.

Implemented dolt sync watchdog: per-project bd dolt push/pull on full-sync tick with divergence detection, 2x backoff on errors, time-bound subprocesses. New /api/v1/orchestrator/dolt-sync endpoint, dashboard indicator, alerts integration. 32 new tests pass.
